stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
On a TCAS II display, you see a yellow/amber disc. What does this represent?

options.a: A Traffic Advisory (TA) with a climb, climb aural instruction.
options.b: A Traffic Advisory (TA) with a 45 - 35 second closure time to the intruder.
options.d: A non-threatening traffic outside the advisory range.
